'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 6''' is the sixth issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in winter [[1996]]. The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 6, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with a Topps Finest chromium [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] promotional trading card and a ''[[1996 Topps Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Widevision]]'' promotional card. This issue also included the fold-out poster article ''[[Predators for Hire: A Guide to Star Wars Bounty Hunters]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
